news.title: 3 Reasons to Sell SWKS and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
news.summary: Skyworks Solutions currently trades at $65.78 per share and has shown little upside over the past six months, posting a middling return of 2.1%. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 9.3% gain during that period.

The company has also joined the Russell 1000 Defensive Index, highlighting its inclusion in key defensive equity benchmarks.
